title: Masky Minecraft Earth Pigs
body:
This is a Datapack that allows to add Minecraft Earth versions to Minecraft Vanilla using the features of snapshot “25w05a”
**USE A VERSION HIGHER THAN "25w02a" FOR IT TO WORK**

![Forest Pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db297072d7dcc48f38621fd8cb6ed1706e7e2011.png)

This package contains:
- Dried Muddy Ping 🐷 - Plains
- Motted Pig 🐷 - Forest
- Muddy Pig 🐷 - Plains
- Pale Pig 🐷 - Snowy Taiga, Pale Garden
- Piebald Pig 🐷 - Forest
- Pink Footed Pig 🐷 - Forest
- Spotted Pig 🐷 - Swamp
